zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Tempest於大約1384年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，她的父親Sir Richard VII Tempest29歲，母親Margaret Staynforth21歲。她於1400年與Sir Laurence Hamerton在英國越可爾布拉可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年97歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾朗 普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Tempest于大约1384年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard VII Tempest29岁，母亲Margaret Staynforth21岁。她于1400年与Sir Laurence Hamerton在英国越可爾布拉可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年在英国英格兰越可爾享年97岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾朗 普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Tempest was born about 1384, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard VII Tempest, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Staynforth, was 21. She married Sir Laurence Hamerton in 1400, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1480, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97, and was buried in Long Preston, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Mary Churchyard, Long Preston, Nor: Long Preston, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Tempest est née environ 1384, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard VII Tempest, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Staynforth, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Laurence Hamerton en 1400, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1480, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Long Preston, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary Churchyard, Long Preston, Nor: Long Preston, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Tempest um 1384 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard VII Tempest 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Staynforth 21. Sie hat 1400 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England Sir Laurence Hamerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Long Preston, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Tempest è nata il circa 1384 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard VII Tempest, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Staynforth, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Laurence Hamerton nel 1400, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1480, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Long Preston, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Tempestが約1384年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard VII Tempestは29歳，母Margaret Staynforthは21歳であった。1400年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでSir Laurence Hamertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで97歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアロング プレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary Churchyard, Long Preston, Nor: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 론그 프레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Tempest(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard VII Tempest(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Staynforth(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Sir Laurence Hamerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 론그 프레스턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Laurence Hamerton em 1400, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.Saint Mary Churchyard, Long Preston, Nor: лонг престон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Tempest родилась около 1384 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard VII Tempest было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Staynforth, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Laurence Hamerton в 1400 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1480 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности лонг престон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Laurence Hamerton en 1400, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1480, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Long Preston, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
